<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#efe7dd" />

  <!-- Chessboard using a 2x2 tile pattern (each square 48px, board 384px) -->
  <defs>
    <pattern id="checker" width="96" height="96" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="48" height="48" fill="#f0d9b5" />
      <rect x="48" y="0" width="48" height="48" fill="#b58863" />
      <rect x="0" y="48" width="48" height="48" fill="#b58863" />
      <rect x="48" y="48" width="48" height="48" fill="#f0d9b5" />
    </pattern>
    <!-- subtle shadow filter -->
    <filter id="soft" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="6" result="b" />
      <feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- board frame -->
  <rect x="60" y="60" width="392" height="392" rx="8" fill="#8b5a2b" />
  <rect x="64" y="64" width="384" height="384" rx="6" fill="url(#checker)" />

  <!-- shadows for pieces -->
  <ellipse cx="328" cy="320" rx="36" ry="10" fill="#000" opacity="0.25" filter="url(#soft)" />
  <ellipse cx="232" cy="330" rx="50" ry="12" fill="#000" opacity="0.18" filter="url(#soft)" />

  <!-- Rook (standing, delivering mate) on a square toward the right -->
  <g transform="translate(328,232)">
    <!-- base plinth -->
    <rect x="-20" y="22" width="40" height="10" rx="3" fill="#222" />
    <rect x="-16" y="-20" width="32" height="42" rx="6" fill="#111" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-opacity="0.06" stroke-width="2" />
    <!-- crenellations -->
    <rect x="-16" y="-34" width="10" height="14" fill="#111" />
    <rect x="-2" y="-34" width="10" height="14" fill="#111" />
    <rect x="12" y="-34" width="10" height="14" fill="#111" />
    <!-- narrow band under crenellations -->
    <rect x="-18" y="-22" width="36" height="6" fill="#222" />
  </g>

  <!-- King (tipped over to indicate checkmate) -->
  <g transform="translate(232,268) rotate(-35) scale(1.05)">
    <!-- body/stack -->
    <rect x="-22" y="6" width="44" height="10" rx="4" fill="#111" />
    <rect x="-16" y="-14" width="32" height="20" rx="8" fill="#111" />
    <circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="18" fill="#111" />
    <!-- crown: three small rounded peaks -->
    <g fill="#111">
      <ellipse cx="-12" cy="-40" rx="6" ry="6" />
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="-44" rx="6" ry="6" />
      <ellipse cx="12" cy="-40" rx="6" ry="6" />
      <rect x="-18" y="-36" width="36" height="6" rx="2" />
    </g>
    <!-- small decorative band and base detail -->
    <rect x="-10" y="-6" width="20" height="4" rx="2" fill="#222" />
    <rect x="-30" y="16" width="60" height="8" rx="4" fill="#111" />
    <!-- faint highlight stroke to separate from board -->
    <path d="M-12 8 L12 8" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-opacity="0.05" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" />
  </g>

  <!-- small visual cue: a tilted, narrow broken ring near king to imply defeat (no text) -->
  <g transform="translate(232,268) rotate(-35)">
    <path d="M30 18 A22 22 0 1 0 12 -6" fill="none" stroke="#a33" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.9" />
  </g>

</svg>

{
  "svg": "<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#efe7dd" />

  <!-- Chessboard using a 2x2 tile pattern (each square 48px, board 384px) -->
  <defs>
    <pattern id="checker" width="96" height="96" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="48" height="48" fill="#f0d9b5" />
      <rect x="48" y="0" width="48" height="48" fill="#b58863" />
      <rect x="0" y="48" width="48" height="48" fill="#b58863" />
      <rect x="48" y="48" width="48" height="48" fill="#f0d9b5" />
    </pattern>
    <!-- subtle shadow filter -->
    <filter id="soft" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="6" result="b" />
      <feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- board frame -->
  <rect x="60" y="60" width="392" height="392" rx="8" fill="#8b5a2b" />
  <rect x="64" y="64" width="384" height="384" rx="6" fill="url(#checker)" />

  <!-- shadows for pieces -->
  <ellipse cx="328" cy="320" rx="36" ry="10" fill="#000" opacity="0.25" filter="url(#soft)" />
  <ellipse cx="232" cy="330" rx="50" ry="12" fill="#000" opacity="0.18" filter="url(#soft)" />

  <!-- Rook (standing, delivering mate) on a square toward the right -->
  <g transform="translate(328,232)">
    <!-- base plinth -->
    <rect x="-20" y="22" width="40" height="10" rx="3" fill="#222" />
    <rect x="-16" y="-20" width="32" height="42" rx="6" fill="#111" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-opacity="0.06" stroke-width="2" />
    <!-- crenellations -->
    <rect x="-16" y="-34" width="10" height="14" fill="#111" />
    <rect x="-2" y="-34" width="10" height="14" fill="#111" />
    <rect x="12" y="-34" width="10" height="14" fill="#111" />
    <!-- narrow band under crenellations -->
    <rect x="-18" y="-22" width="36" height="6" fill="#222" />
  </g>

  <!-- King (tipped over to indicate checkmate) -->
  <g transform="translate(232,268) rotate(-35) scale(1.05)">
    <!-- body/stack -->
    <rect x="-22" y="6" width="44" height="10" rx="4" fill="#111" />
    <rect x="-16" y="-14" width="32" height="20" rx="8" fill="#111" />
    <circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="18" fill="#111" />
    <!-- crown: three small rounded peaks -->
    <g fill="#111">
      <ellipse cx="-12" cy="-40" rx="6" ry="6" />
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="-44" rx="6" ry="6" />
      <ellipse cx="12" cy="-40" rx="6" ry="6" />
      <rect x="-18" y="-36" width="36" height="6" rx="2" />
    </g>
    <!-- small decorative band and base detail -->
    <rect x="-10" y="-6" width="20" height="4" rx="2" fill="#222" />
    <rect x="-30" y="16" width="60" height="8" rx="4" fill="#111" />
    <!-- faint highlight stroke to separate from board -->
    <path d="M-12 8 L12 8" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-opacity="0.05" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" />
  </g>

  <!-- small visual cue: a tilted, narrow broken ring near king to imply defeat (no text) -->
  <g transform="translate(232,268) rotate(-35)">
    <path d="M30 18 A22 22 0 1 0 12 -6" fill="none" stroke="#a33" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.9" />
  </g>

</svg>"
}
